name: LV_099_02_STLINEFORINVCALC
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_099_02_STLINEFORINVCALC] AS
SELECT CASE WHEN (X.STOCKREF > 0) THEN X.STOCKREF
       ELSE ( SELECT M.STOCKREF FROM LG_099_02_STLINE M
              WHERE (M.INVOICELNNO = ( SELECT MAX(INVOICELNNO) FROM LG_099_02_STLINE STRNS
                                       WHERE (STRNS.LINETYPE NOT IN(1, 2, 3, 7))
                                       AND (STRNS.INVOICELNNO < X.INVOICELNNO )
                                  AND (STRNS.INVOICEREF = X.INVOICEREF) ))
              AND M.DETLINE = 0
              AND M.INVOICEREF = X.INVOICEREF ) END STOCKREF,
       X.LOGICALREF, X.LINETYPE, X.PREVLINEREF, X.PREVLINENO, X.DETLINE, X.TRCODE, X.DATE_, X.FTIME, X.GLOBTRANS, X.CALCTYPE,
       X.PRODORDERREF, X.SOURCETYPE, X.SOURCEINDEX, X.SOURCECOSTGRP, X.SOURCEWSREF, X.SOURCEPOLNREF, X.DESTTYPE, X.DESTINDEX,
       X.DESTCOSTGRP, X.DESTWSREF, X.DESTPOLNREF, X.FACTORYNR, X.IOCODE, X.STFICHEREF, X.STFICHELNNO, X.INVOICEREF, X.INVOICELNNO,
       X.CLIENTREF, X.ORDTRANSREF, X.ORDFICHEREF, X.CENTERREF, X.ACCOUNTREF, X.VATACCREF, X.VATCENTERREF, X.PRACCREF, X.PRCENTERREF,
       X.PRVATACCREF, X.PRVATCENREF, X.PROMREF, X.PAYDEFREF, X.SPECODE, X.DELVRYCODE, X.AMOUNT, X.PRICE, X.TOTAL, X.PRCURR, X.PRPRICE,
       X.TRCURR, X.TRRATE, X.REPORTRATE, X.DISTCOST, X.DISTDISC, X.DISTEXP, X.DISTPROM, X.DISCPER, X.LINEEXP, X.UOMREF, X.USREF, X.UINFO1,
       X.UINFO2, X.UINFO3, X.UINFO4, X.UINFO5, X.UINFO6, X.UINFO7, X.UINFO8, X.PLNAMOUNT, X.VATINC, X.VAT, X.VATAMNT, X.VATMATRAH, X.BILLEDITEM,
       X.BILLED, X.CPSTFLAG, X.RETCOSTTYPE, X.SOURCELINK, X.RETCOST, X.RETCOSTCURR, X.OUTCOST, X.OUTCOSTCURR, X.RETAMOUNT, X.FAREGREF, X.FAATTRIB,
       X.CANCELLED, X.LINENET, X.DISTADDEXP, X.FADACCREF, X.FADCENTERREF, X.FARACCREF, X.FARCENTERREF, X.DIFFPRICE, X.DIFFPRCOST, X.DECPRDIFF,
       X.LPRODSTAT, X.PRDEXPTOTAL, X.DIFFREPPRICE, X.DIFFPRCRCOST, X.SALESMANREF, X.FAPLACCREF, X.FAPLCENTERREF, X.OUTPUTIDCODE, X.DREF,
       X.COSTRATE, X.XPRICEUPD, X.XPRICE, X.XREPRATE, X.DISTCOEF, X.TRANSQCOK, X.SITEID, X.RECSTATUS, X.ORGLOGICREF, X.WFSTATUS, X.POLINEREF,
       X.PLNSTTRANSREF, X.NETDISCFLAG, X.NETDISCPERC, X.NETDISCAMNT, X.VATCALCDIFF, X.CONDITIONREF, X.DISTORDERREF, X.DISTORDLINEREF,
       X.CAMPAIGNREFS1, X.CAMPAIGNREFS2, X.CAMPAIGNREFS3, X.CAMPAIGNREFS4, X.CAMPAIGNREFS5, X.POINTCAMPREF, X.CAMPPOINT, X.PROMCLASITEMREF,
       X.CMPGLINEREF, X.PLNSTTRANSPERNR, X.PORDCLSPLNAMNT, X.VENDCOMM, X.PREVIOUSOUTCOST, X.COSTOFSALEACCREF, X.PURCHACCREF, X.COSTOFSALECNTREF,
       X.PURCHCENTREF, X.PREVOUTCOSTCURR, X.ABVATAMOUNT, X.ABVATSTATUS, X.PRRATE, X.ADDTAXRATE, X.ADDTAXCONVFACT, X.ADDTAXAMOUNT, X.ADDTAXPRCOST,
       X.ADDTAXRETCOST, X.ADDTAXRETCOSTCURR, X.GROSSUINFO1, X.GROSSUINFO2, X.ADDTAXPRCOSTCURR, X.ADDTAXACCREF, X.ADDTAXCENTERREF, X.ADDTAXAMNTISUPD,
       X.INFIDX, X.ADDTAXCOSACCREF, X.ADDTAXCOSCNTREF, X.PREVIOUSATAXPRCOST, X.PREVATAXPRCOSTCURR, X.PRDORDTOTCOEF, X.DEMPEGGEDAMNT, X.STDUNITCOST,
       X.STDRPUNITCOST, X.COSTDIFFACCREF, X.COSTDIFFCENREF, X.TEXTINC, X.ADDTAXDISCAMOUNT, X.ORGLOGOID, X.EXIMFICHENO, X.EXIMFCTYPE, X.TRANSEXPLINE,
       X.INSEXPLINE, X.EXIMWHFCREF, X.EXIMWHLNREF, X.EXIMFILEREF, X.EXIMPROCNR, X.EISRVDSTTYP, X.MAINSTLNREF, X.MADEOFSHRED, X.FROMORDWITHPAY,
       X.PROJECTREF, X.STATUS, X.DORESERVE, X.POINTCAMPREFS1, X.POINTCAMPREFS2, X.POINTCAMPREFS3, X.POINTCAMPREFS4, X.CAMPPOINTS1, X.CAMPPOINTS2,
       X.CAMPPOINTS3, X.CAMPPOINTS4, X.CMPGLINEREFS1, X.CMPGLINEREFS2, X.CMPGLINEREFS3, X.CMPGLINEREFS4, X.PRCLISTREF, X.PORDSYMOUTLN, X.MONTH_,
       X.YEAR_, X.EXADDTAXRATE, X.EXADDTAXCONVF, X.EXADDTAXAREF, X.EXADDTAXCREF, X.OTHRADDTAXAREF, X.OTHRADDTAXCREF, X.EXADDTAXAMNT, X.AFFECTCOLLATRL,
       X.ALTPROMFLAG, X.EIDISTFLNNR, X.EXIMTYPE, X.VARIANTREF, X.CANDEDUCT, X.OUTREMAMNT, X.OUTREMCOST, X.OUTREMCOSTCURR, X.REFLVATACCREF, X.REFLVATOTHACCREF,
       X.PARENTLNREF, X.AFFECTRISK, X.INEFFECTIVECOST, X.ADDTAXVATMATRAH, X.REFLACCREF, X.REFLOTHACCREF, X.CAMPPAYDEFREF, X.FAREGBINDDATE, X.RELTRANSLNREF,
       X.FROMTRANSFER, X.COSTDISTPRICE, X.COSTDISTREPPRICE, X.DIFFPRICEUFRS, X.DIFFREPPRICEUFRS, X.OUTCOSTUFRS, X.OUTCOSTCURRUFRS, X.DIFFPRCOSTUFRS,
       X.DIFFPRCRCOSTUFRS, X.RETCOSTUFRS, X.RETCOSTCURRUFRS, X.OUTREMCOSTUFRS, X.OUTREMCOSTCURRUFRS, X.INFIDXUFRS, X.ADJPRICEUFRS, X.ADJREPPRICEUFRS,
       X.ADJPRCOSTUFRS, X.ADJPRCRCOSTUFRS, X.COSTDISTPRICEUFRS, X.COSTDISTREPPRICEUFRS, X.PURCHACCREFUFRS, X.PURCHCENTREFUFRS, X.COSACCREFUFRS,
       X.COSCNTREFUFRS, X.PROUTCOSTUFRSDIFF, X.PROUTCOSTCRUFRSDIFF, X.UNDERDEDUCTLIMIT, X.GLOBALID, X.DEDUCTIONPART1, X.DEDUCTIONPART2, X.GUID,
       X.SPECODE2, X.OFFERREF, X.OFFTRANSREF, X.VATEXCEPTREASON, X.PLNDEFSERILOTNO, X.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT, X.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT, X.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
       X.FALINKTYPE, X.DEDUCTCODE, X.UPDTHISLINE, X.VATEXCEPTCODE, X.PORDERFICHENO, X.QPRODFCREF, X.RELTRANSFCREF, X.ATAXEXCEPTREASON, X.ATAXEXCEPTCODE,
       X.PRODORDERTYP, X.SUBCONTORDERREF, X.QPRODFCTYP, X.PRDORDSLPLNRESERVE, X.INFDATE, X.DESTSTATUS, X.REGTYPREF, X.FALOSSCENTREF, X.FAPROFITACCREF,
       X.FAPROFITCENTREF, X.FALOSSACCREF
FROM LG_099_02_STLINE X
WHERE (X.INVOICEREF > 0)
